tasks_completed.description: Updated .gitignore: changed workflow-current.json to workflow-*.json, added .codex, .playwright-mcp/, qa-*.png
tasks_completed.changes: Line 91: .claude/workflow-current.json -> .claude/workflow-*.json; added 6 lines: .codex, .playwright-mcp/, qa-*.png with comments
tasks_completed.rationale: Root cause: .gitignore patterns incomplete — only covered workflow-current.json not UUID variants; .codex and .playwright-mcp/ were missing entirely

tasks_completed.description: git rm --cached .codex (untracked from index, kept on disk)
tasks_completed.rationale: Empty sentinel file should not be tracked
Transient playwright screenshot should not be tracked

tasks_completed.description: git rm --cached qa-*.png (8 files untracked from index)
tasks_completed.changes: 8 qa-*.png files removed from git index: qa-happy-8097-new-page.png, qa-happy-after-auth.png, qa-happy-root-page.png, qa-iter2-dev-smoketest-session.png, qa-iter2-session-view.png, qa-iter3-dev-smoketest-session.png, qa-iter3-session-view.png, qa-iter8-session-view.png

blocked_tasks.hook_message: BLOCKED: Deleting/moving workflow state files is forbidden. These files are required by the workflow enforcement system.
blocked_tasks.user_action_required: To untrack these 10 files, run manually in /root/multi-asset-portfolio: git rm --cached .claude/workflow-*.json

blocked_tasks.description: Delete qa-*.png files from disk (8 files)
blocked_tasks.hook_message: BLOCKED: rm is forbidden — delete files manually or ask the user
blocked_tasks.note: git rm --cached for these files DID succeed — they are already untracked from the index. Only physical deletion is blocked.
blocked_tasks.user_action_required: To delete these files from disk, run manually: rm /root/multi-asset-portfolio/qa-*.png

git_rationale.why_issue_occurred: .gitignore pattern .claude/workflow-current.json only matched a literal filename, not UUID workflow files. .codex and .playwright-mcp/ patterns were never added.
git_rationale.how_fix_addresses_root: .gitignore now uses .claude/workflow-*.json (glob), .codex, .playwright-mcp/, qa-*.png to prevent future tracking of these file classes.

self_verification.notes: git ls-files confirms: .codex untracked, .playwright-mcp PNG untracked, all 8 qa-*.png untracked. charts/ confirmed still tracked (5+ files verified). 10 workflow UUID files still tracked (blocked by hook — requires user action). qa-*.png files still exist on disk (rm blocked by hook — requires user action).

dev.qa_notes: Two manual steps required before QA can pass AC2/AC3: (1) cd /root/multi-asset-portfolio && git rm --cached .claude/workflow-*.json to untrack 10 workflow files; (2) rm /root/multi-asset-portfolio/qa-*.png to delete screenshots from disk. Both blocked by pretool-bash-safety.sh hook. .gitignore changes are complete and correct. charts/ directory untouched.

blocking_issues.impact: 10 workflow UUID files remain tracked in git index
blocking_issues.resolution: User must run: cd /root/multi-asset-portfolio && git rm --cached .claude/workflow-*.json

blocking_issues.issue: pretool-bash-safety.sh blocked rm of qa-*.png files
blocking_issues.impact: 8 qa-*.png files remain on disk (but are already untracked from git index)

recommendations: User should run the two blocked commands manually (listed in blocking_issues)
After running both commands, git status should show only .gitignore as modified in multi-asset-portfolio
